news.headline: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust Q3 2024 net income $31.0M, $0.36/share, with net investment income $80.9M. Dividend: $0.40/share.
news.summary: WESTLAKE VILLAGE, Calif.—PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) disclosed a net income attributable to common shareholders of $31.0 million, equivalent to $0.36 per common share on a diluted basis for Q3 of 2024. The net investment income stood at $80.9 million. Additionally, PMT declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per common share for Q3 2024 on September 19, 2024, scheduled to be disbursed on October 25, 2024, to common shareholders.

news.headline: Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024. Conference call at 2:00PM PT / 5:00PM ET.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California, Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VEL), a prominent provider of commercial investor loans, is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, after the markets close. The company's executive management will conduct a conference call and webcast to discuss the results at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The conference call will be available for live webcasting in listen-only mode.

news.headline: EU funds Cemex-Linde consortium with €157M for CO2 capture project at Rüdersdorf Cement Plant, aiming to capture 1.3M metric tons of CO2 annually.
news.summary: In Monterrey, Mexico, an alliance between Cemex and Linde has secured €157 million from the EU Innovation Fund for a groundbreaking CO2 capture initiative at Cemex’s Rüdersdorf Cement Plant in Germany. This project, considered Cemex’s most significant Carbon Capture Use and Storage (CCUS) endeavor, targets capturing 1.3 million metric tons of CO2 annually from the cement production at Rüdersdorf.

news.headline: Net Power (NYSE: NPWR) to release third quarter 2024 financial results on Nov 11, 2024; conference call on Nov 12 at 8:30 AM ET.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, NET Power Inc. (NYSE: NPWR) is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 after the market closes on Monday, November 11, 2024. A conference call discussing the results will take place on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, starting at 8:30 AM ET. For those interested, the live audio webcast of the call can be accessed on Net Power’s investor relations website at ir.netpower.com. Participants can also join by phone by dialing 877-407-8014 (domestic) or +1 201-689-8053 (international).

news.headline: Stock price for Starbucks tumbles due to underwhelming outcome, citing ineffective promotions.
Blanket partners with Crane to empower property managers in innovative solutions. Dallas, Oct 22, 2024.

news.headline: Greystar's Summerwell Sunterra in Katy, Texas is now offering tours, marking its 1st build-for-rent project in the Houston area.
news.summary: Greystar, a prominent figure in real estate investment, development, and management of rental housing, logistics, and life sciences, has initiated its inaugural build-for-rent project in the Houston area in KATY, Texas. This milestone was unveiled on October 22, 2024. This announcement signifies a significant step for Greystar as they branch into this new venture, marking their strategic expansion in the market. The build-for-rent project in the Houston area is a testament to Greystar’s commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: SelectQuote (NYSE: SLQT) will release Q1 2025 earnings on Nov 4; CEO and CFO to host conference call at 8:30 am ET.

The CEO, Tim Danker, and CFO, Ryan Clement, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:30 am ET to review the outcomes. The company's stock trades on NYSE under the symbol SLQT.

news.headline: Andre Schulten appointed to Eaton's Board of Directors, effective Oct 22, 2024. Schulten is the CFO of P&G.
news.summary: Eaton, a prominent intelligent power management company listed on the NYSE as ETN, has revealed the election of Andre Schulten to its Board of Directors commencing on October 22, 2024. Schulten currently holds the position of Chief Financial Officer at The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G), a renowned multinational consumer goods corporation. Before assuming his current role, Schulten acted as Senior Vice President of Baby Care, North America within the company. With a tenure at P&G that began in 1996, Schulten has held various finance and accounting positions throughout his career.

These positive figures demonstrate a strong performance in credit as well.

Rotary, a subsidiary of Vehicle Service Group (VSG) and Dover (NYSE: DOV), unveiled the new Rotary® R1250 Automatic Leverless Pro Tire Changer and Rotary® ARO16 Four-Post lift as part of this milestone.

news.headline: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) to acquire Visual Lease, a lease administration platform. Enhances Real Estate Manager business, targets corporations.
news.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP), a prominent provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, and analytics, has announced its agreement to acquire Visual Lease, a leading software platform for lease management and accounting. This strategic move aims to bolster CoStar Group’s Real Estate Manager business line and offer enhanced services to corporations of various sizes. Visual Lease, established in 1996, will bring added value to lease management and accounting processes through this acquisition.

news.summary: LADSON, S.C., Keel announced the appointment of a new Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer to enhance the leadership team. This move aims to bolster the company's business infrastructure and facilitate capacity expansion.

news.summary: AMCON Distributing Company, a Convenience and Foodservice Distributor based in Omaha, Nebraska, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per common share. news.headline: National Bank Holdings Corp reported Q3 net income of $33.1M, EPS $0.86, ROA 1.32%, and increased dividend to $0.29 per share. Loan portfolio remained stable at $7.7B with notable financial performance improvements from Q2, driven by net interest income and fee income growth. Non-performing loans ratio decreased to 0.31% at Sep 30, 2024. Quarterly cash dividend increased by 3.6%. Company shows strength in capital ratios: common equity tier 1 ratio of 12.88%. Total assets stood at $9,993M with $8,497M in total transaction deposits. Tangible common book value per share was $24.91.
news.summary: National Bank Holdings Corporation (NBHC) reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, with net income increasing by $7 million to $33.1 million compared to the previous quarter. Earnings per diluted share were $0.86, and return on average tangible common equity was 14.84%. Total assets amounted to $9.99 billion, with total deposits of $8.5 billion. Loan balances remained at $7.7 billion. The company recorded $2 million of provision expense for credit losses, with non-performing loans decreasing to 0.31% of total loans. Shareholders' equity was $1.29 billion, with common book value per share at $34.01 and tangible common book value per share at $24.91. NBHC announced a 3.6% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.29 per share. The company also highlighted its disciplined loan and deposit pricing approach and diverse revenue streams as key drivers of performance. Overall, the company remains well-capitalized with strong liquidity.

news.headline: Maplewood Senior Living wins Silver in 2024 McKnight's Tech Awards for Fall Prevention with SafelyYou.
news.summary: Maplewood Senior Living, a prominent luxury senior living provider based in SOUTHPORT, Conn., has recently received recognition for its collaboration with SafelyYou. The partnership was honored with a Silver medal in the "Fall Prevention, Management, or Detection" category at an event on Oct. 22, 2024. This prestigious award was presented as part of the McKnight's program, highlighting Maplewood's commitment to enhancing safety and well-being for seniors.

news.headline: Gold mining stocks hit August 2020 highs with a 9-day winning streak. Gold prices rose to $2,744/ounce. Analysts suggest adding gold exposure for a diversified portfolio amid geopolitical risks.
news.summary: The VanEck Gold Miners ETF (NYSE:GDX) has been on a winning streak, with nine consecutive sessions of gains, bringing them to their highest levels since August 2020. This marks the longest period of gains for gold miners in over three years, fueled by strong investor demand and rising gold prices. Gold prices surged by 0.9% to $2,744 per ounce on Tuesday, setting new record highs and boosting confidence in precious metals. Imaru Casanova, a portfolio manager at VanEck specializing in gold and precious metals, advised that now is an opportune time to increase gold exposure, emphasizing gold as a foundational element rather than a tactical move in a diversified portfolio. Casanova highlighted the importance of gold as a permanent allocation, especially given the current landscape of increasing geopolitical and economic uncertainties. The gold miners are setting their sights on reaching record highs as they continue their upward trajectory.

news.headline: "Live event & podcast 'House of War' by Daniel Sadan debuts this week. Explores radical Islamism & Muslim Brotherhood impact on West. GAITHERSBURG, Md., Oct 22, 2024"
news.summary: Analyzing the influence of radical Islamism, focusing on the Muslim Brotherhood's threat to the Western world, a recent event in Gaithersburg, Maryland on October 22, 2024, witnessed Daniel Sadan, a U.S. businessman and Executive Producer, revealing plans for House of War. This new venture encompasses live events and podcasts, aiming to delve into the concerning issues surrounding Islamic extremism. The House of War series is anticipated to shed light on critical aspects, attracting attention and engagement from the audience.

news.headline: James Fay joins Mitek Systems Board of Directors and Audit Committee, bringing 20+ years of financial expertise from Matterport.

news.summary: CoStar Group, Inc. reported a revenue of $693 million for the quarter ending September 30, 2024, showing an 11% increase from $625 million in the same period in 2023. The net income for Q3 2024 was $53 million, marking a significant 176% rise from the previous quarter. The net income per diluted share stood at $0.13. CoStar Group, Inc. is a renowned provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, and analytics in the property sector.

news.headline: Watsco (NYSE: WSO) to announce earnings with estimated EPS of $4.76. Historical EPS performance shows slight misses. Shares up 43.65% in 52-week period. Analyst consensus: Outperform, with $499.0 target, 1.38% upside potential.

news.headline: Starbucks increases quarterly cash dividend from $0.57 to $0.61 per share, raising annual dividend rate to $2.44 per share.
news.summary: In Seattle, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) revealed a boost in its quarterly cash dividend from $0.57 to $0.61 per share of outstanding Common Stock. The new dividend rate of $0.61 will take effect from the dividend payable on November 29, 2024. Shareholders of record on November 15, 2024, will be eligible for this increased dividend, which raises the annual dividend rate to $2.44 per share. Starbucks first introduced its dividend in 2010 at $0.05 per share of outstanding Common Stock.

news.headline: USANA reports Q3 2024 results with $200M net sales and $0.56 diluted EPS. Updates FY 2024 outlook to $850M net sales and $2.45 EPS.
news.summary: USANA Health Sciences, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter ending on September 28, 2024. Net sales in the third quarter stood at $200 million, a decrease from $213 million in Q3 2023. Diluted EPS for the third quarter was reported at $0.56, down from $0.59 in Q3 2023. The company has revised its net sales and diluted EPS forecast for fiscal year 2024 to around $850 million and $2.45, respectively, which were previously anticipated to be $850 million.

news.headline: Starbucks releases preliminary Q4 and full fiscal year 2024 results; global comp store sales declined.
news.summary: In Seattle today, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) released its preliminary financial results for the 13-week fiscal fourth quarter and 52-week fiscal year ending on September 29, 2024. The GAAP results for fiscal years 2024 and 2023 incorporate certain items that are excluded from the non-GAAP results. For a detailed breakdown, kindly check the reconciliation of GAAP to non-GAAP measures provided at the conclusion of this statement. In the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024, global comparable store sales experienced a decrease.
